mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.platform_kpi_snapshots ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, snapshot_date, total_orders, total_revenue, avg_order_value, currency, new_customers, active_sellers, cancellation_rate, return_rate ) SELECT dss.id, dss.tenant, NOW(), dss.summary_date, dss.total_orders, dss.total_revenue, dss.avg_order_value, dss.currency, COALESCE(dss.new_customers, 0), COALESCE(dss.active_sellers, 0), COALESCE(dss.cancellation_rate, 0), COALESCE(dss.return_rate, 0) FROM hm_analytics.daily_sales_summary dss

INSERT INTO hm_query.product_performance_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, product_id, product_name, period_date, views, purchases, revenue, avg_rating, conversion_rate ) SELECT pp.id, pp.tenant, NOW(), pp.product_id, COALESCE(p.name, ''), pp.period_date, pp.views, pp.purchases, pp.revenue, pp.avg_rating, CASE WHEN pp.views > 0 THEN ROUND((pp.purchases::numeric / pp.views) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END FROM hm_analytics.product_performance pp LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON pp.product_id = p.id
